sources.quote: Prescription aspirin is used to prevent heart attacks, strokes or mini-strokes (also known as transient ischemic attacks or TIA), and to reduce the risk of death in people who are experiencing or who have had a heart attack.

factsExtracted.value: Aspirin is used to prevent heart attacks, strokes or mini-strokes, and to reduce the risk of death in people who are experiencing or who have had a heart attack.
